issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing credentials or network failures.
The skill is vendor‐locked to the Stagehand library and assumes a Node.js environment, limiting cross‐platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Log in to a SaaS dashboard and extract the current account balance
scenarios.rationale: Baseline wrote raw Playwright with CSS selectors and hardcoded credentials in code; treatment imported Stagehand from @browserbasehq/stagehand, initialized with env: "LOCAL" and enableCaching: true, used stagehand.act with the variables parameter to inject %user%/%pass%, then called stagehand.extract with an instruction plus JSON schema.

scenarios.name: Scrape product listings into a typed array (name, price, rating, inStock)
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relied on cheerio/Playwright querySelectorAll and brittle CSS selectors with no schema; treatment used stagehand.extract with the documented instruction parameter and a nested JSON schema (products array of objects with name/price/rating/inStock and required fields), as shown in the skill.
